FieldLabel:
* Other Approach
    Name the approach if other" was selected from the dropdown."

* Description
    Describe how the information needed to complete the Performance Report will be collected.

* Summary
    
      Summarize any additional project for which OE was requested, or any additional needs that remain after the
      performance of readiness reviews.

* Participant Group
    Describe the group of individuals affected.

* Participant Individuals
    
      Name and list the number of individuals in the participant group, using the format Name (#).
      For example: Interviewees (4), Manager Interviewees (2). Lists with more than one type of individual
      should be separated by a comma (,).

* Task
    
      List task/activities/events from the appraisal schedule.

* Time (hours)
    
      Elapsed time for each activity.
